title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Chiffon, Pudding, Judge, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell is that?! How is he lifting that with one leg!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to head for the southeastern seas, Bege!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But the big man is not

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: there, there, pez. I know, it was noisy, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're go- ing to have to crush a few choco houses on the way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no other way we can make sure all of us get off this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Who even is that guy?! A pervert?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you go- ing to let them get away?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold off on the cannons! The cake will be damaged!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Battleships! Head for the southeastern side of the island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now there aren't any battleships to chase after us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We've made it off cacao Island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't do it for you, black leg!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it just me or is it getting hot in here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: @forFaribR! Something's weird with the ocean- rero!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've been boiled by the heat of the ocean?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's just the right amount of salt... they'd probably be pretty deli- cious!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's but one person that can do something like that...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 55 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
